'''Imperial tankers''' were long, tube-shaped [[Transport/Legends|transports]] in use by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. One of their uses was transporting [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna gas]].

==History==
At least one participated in the [[raid on Bespin]].<ref name="Rogue Leader">''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Imperial Tankers appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]''. A co-op version of the campaign was included in ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron II: Rogue Leader]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''
